_comment: pa11y config used by the accessibility CI job (.github/workflows/ci.yml). Chromium is launched with --no-sandbox because GitHub Actions runners run as a non-privileged user without unprivileged user-namespace support, and the default sandboxed launch SIGSEGVs immediately. --disable-setuid-sandbox and --disable-dev-shm-usage are the standard companions for containerised / CI Chromium runs.
